---
title: "Sebastian Metz"
about:
  id: about-description
  template: jolla
  image: images/photo_metz.jpeg
  image-shape: round
  links: 
      - icon: twitter
        text: twitter
        href: https://twitter.com/seba_metz
      - icon: github
        text: Github
        href: https://github.com/sebametz
      - icon: envelope
        text: contact me!
        href: ./contact.qmd
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
---

:::{.column-page}

:::{#about-description}

I am a Bioinformatician with a PhD in Molecular Biology and Biotechnology. Currently, I am working as a Postdoc at the [Station Biologique de Roscoff][roscoff], Roscoff, France. I am interested in microbial Ecology and Evolution (See my [Publications](publications.qmd) for more info). I love to code. Mostly I use R and Python to answer my research questions. I am also interested in web development and database management. Therefore, I like to spend some time learning about these. In my spare time, I like to bike, travel and **Run**. After having COVID-19 in September 2022, I started a journey to become a runner, training every week with the objective of participating in one marathon from [Abbot World Marathon Majors][abbot].

## Education

**National University of San Martín (UNSAM), San Martín** | Buenos Aires, Argentina
PhD in *Molecular Biology and Biotechnology* | Apr 2015 - Oct 2020

**National University of Entre Ríos (UNER), Oro Verde** | Paraná Argentina
Licenciado (Similar to MSc) in *Bioinformatics* | Feb 2010 - Mar 2015

## Experience

**Postdoctoral researcher** | [Station Biologique de Roscoff][roscoff] | Jan 2022 - present

**Postdoctoral researcher** | [Laboratoire des sciences de l'Environnement Marin][LEMAR] | Nov 2020 - Jan 2022

:::

:::

[roscoff]:https://www.sb-roscoff.fr/en/metz-sebastian/4172?lab_id=117&group_id=3144
[LEMAR]:https://www-iuem.univ-brest.fr/lemar/
[abbot]:https://www.worldmarathonmajors.com/
